history.summary: Core Lean repair/K, trace, circle/torus, paper, companion, tag, and gates pass, but active source comments, project instructions, and the paper README still advertise false genuine π₁/normalization claims.

The specifically failed instruction/README/docs and direct Circle/Torus comments are corrected and all listed gates pass, but paper/main.tex retains unscoped normalization/completeness claims and MobiusBand.lean retains a contradictory deformation-retract description.

The residual paper and Mobius contradictions are corrected, external BSL prerequisites are documented, v2 citations resolve while v1 remains, all active scans are clean, and every listed theorem/API/build/paper gate passes.
